backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no logic or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented game features to their source files, components, and test IDs for the Pharaoh's Conquest project.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file describing their roles in the Egyptian auto-chess game.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting the page title to 'Pharaoh's Conquest' and loading Google Fonts (Cinzel, Cinzel Decorative, EB Garamond) for the game.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component wrapping QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and GameProvider, routing between MainMenu, the full gameplay screen (HUD, BattleBoard, Shop, SynergyPanel, Bench), and GameOverScreen based on game state.
frontend/src/components/AnimalMesh.tsx: Empty stub file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/BattleBoard.tsx: Renders a 7×4 grid battle board for player and enemy armies with drag-and-drop unit placement, unit tokens showing portraits, HP bars, and star levels, plus battle status banners.
frontend/src/components/BattleLog.tsx: Displays a scrollable log of battle events during the battle phase, auto-scrolling to the latest entry.
frontend/src/components/Bench.tsx: Renders the player's bench of up to 9 units as draggable cards with portraits, HP bars, star levels, and a sell button, showing empty slots for remaining capacity.
frontend/src/components/ControlPanel.tsx: Empty stub file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/EgyptianPanel.ts: Reusable Egyptian-themed panel component with corner decorations, gradient background, gold border styling, and an optional titled header with hieroglyph accent.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Empty stub file with no implementation.
frontend/src/components/GameHUD.tsx: Renders the in-game heads-up display showing round, HP bar, gold, level/XP bar, wins, losses, and win streak, with a button to return to the main menu.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Displays a victory or defeat screen after the game ends, showing round count, wins, and losses stats, with buttons to play again or return to the main menu.
frontend/src/components/GridTile.tsx: Renders a single grid cell on the battle board with drag-and-drop support, visual states for enemy/friendly/occupied/drag-over, and a decorative hieroglyph on empty friendly tiles.
frontend/src/components/HowToPlayModal.t: Displays a modal dialog explaining game mechanics including preparation phase, combat, synergies, gold economy, win conditions, and tips.
frontend/src/components/MainMenu.tsx: Renders the main menu screen with the game title, start and how-to-play buttons, a unit portrait preview row, and an inline how-to-play modal using unit and synergy definitions.
frontend/src/components/Shop.tsx: Renders the in-game shop panel with purchasable unit cards (portrait, tier, traits, cost), reroll, lock, buy-XP, and start-battle controls driven by game state.
frontend/src/components/SynergyPanel.tsx: Displays active synergies from game state, showing trait counts, active bonuses, and next thresholds, plus a collapsible reference list of all synergies.
frontend/src/components/Terrain.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/UnitCard.tsx: Renders a compact or full unit card with portrait, tier stars, HP bar, faction badges, stats, cost, and a tooltip, supporting drag-and-drop and selection states.
frontend/src/components/UnitDetail.tsx: Shows detailed stats, HP bar, traits, abilities, and sell/remove actions for the currently selected unit using game state context.
frontend/src/components/UnitSprite.tsx: Renders a positioned unit sprite on the battle board with an HP bar, portrait, tier stars, name label, and animations for attacking, dying, and selection states.
frontend/src/data/synergies.ts: Defines an array of SynergyDefinition objects for six factions (Priest, Warrior, Nomad, Undead, Royal, Mystic), each with thresholds and bonus descriptions.
frontend/src/data/units.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a UNIT_DEFINITIONS array containing stat blocks, abilities, traits, and portrait URLs for all playable units in the game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and initializing access control when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.tsx: React context and hook providing full auto-battler game state management, including shop generation, enemy board generation, unit placement, and battle logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder file; no backend queries are needed since game state is managed entirely on the frontend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining an Egyptian-themed design system with custom CSS variables for gold, turquoise, lapis, and sand color tokens, plus reusable component classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: TypeScript type definitions for the auto-battler game, covering units, positions, synergies, shop slots, combat events, and overall game state.
frontend/src/utils/combatEngine.ts: Implements a per-tick combat simulation that processes attacks, damage, crits, and deaths for both friendly and enemy units, applying synergy buffs like undead regen and nomad attack speed.
frontend/src/utils/goldEconomy.ts: Utility functions for calculating gold income per round, interest on held gold, total income, and unit sell values.
frontend/src/utils/synergyCalculator.ts: Calculates active synergies from board units by counting faction members and matching thresholds, then derives concrete stat buffs (magic bonus, armor reduction, attack speed, etc.) for each active synergy.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining an ancient-Egyptian design system with custom fonts (Cinzel, EB Garamond), Egyptian-themed color palette (gold, turquoise, lapis, sand), custom shadows, border radii, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (schema v1, version 5) describing the auto-chess game with an ancient Egyptian theme, listing existing implemented features such as the game loop, unit roster, synergy system, battle board, and UI aesthetic.
